question: Will European Central Bank cut interest rates before June 2026?
reason: ECB's recent statements and projections indicate no intention to cut interest rates before June 2026.
evidence: On April 30, 2026, the ECB held rates at 2% and signaled a potential rate hike in June. ([lemonde.fr](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/economy/article/2026/05/01/european-central-bank-moves-toward-a-june-interest-rate-hike_6753032_19.html?utm_source=openai))

On May 4, 2026, Bundesbank President Joachim Nagel suggested a rate hike in June if inflation doesn't improve. ([investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/economy-news/ecb-may-need-to-hike-rates-in-june-nagel-says-4657031?utm_source=openai))

On May 26, 2026, ECB Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel indicated that the ECB plans to raise rates in June to address rising inflation. ([cadenaser.com](https://cadenaser.com/nacional/2026/05/26/el-bce-apunta-a-una-subida-de-tipos-en-junio-para-compensar-la-subida-de-la-inflacion-por-la-guerra-cadena-ser/?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: European Central Bank interest rate decision forecasts May June 2026 inflation and growth outlook
